domaincondition: Supports lengths from 1 to 32 characters; uppercase letters are not supported.
firstDiscoverDomain: You are the first to discover it! Pay the starting price to initiate the auction process.
liveauction: The live auction is in progress
newroot: You can submit a proposal to create a new root domain.
registerDomain: Register decentralized domain names on Solana.
settlingDescription: Settling in progress, you can still bid. No bids allowed after settlement.
unregisteredDomain: This domain name has not been registered yet
witness: Witness the record-breaking sale of the most valuable top-level domain in the Solana ecosystem, with data verified in real-time on the blockchain.
stakeDescription: Support your favorite top-level domain (TLD). When fundraising reaches the goal, this root domain will be activated on the Solana blockchain and generate NFT rights.
domainRentInfo: Used to create an account, will be refunded if the auction fails
referrerRentInfo: Used to pay for user account rent, only for the first transaction
advancedStorageInfo: As the initiator, you need to pay a fixed 5SOL.
rootDomainDescription: Can't find the top-level domain you want? You can submit a new proposal. If the domain complies with Solana naming conventions and raises sufficient initial stake within 7 days, it will be permanently written to the root server.
noCreatingRootDescription: There are currently no top-level domains (TLDs) being funded for creation. You can be the first creator to launch a new root domain project.
fullyDecentralizedOwnershipDesc: Domain records are stored on the blockchain rather than managed by traditional centralized registries. Users directly hold and manage domains through on-chain accounts, achieving true self-custody ownership, avoiding unilateral freezing, deletion, or transfer by platforms or institutions.
anonymousIdentityPrivacyDesc: The system relies solely on on-chain addresses as identity identifiers, requiring no real-name registration or centralized account systems. Users can register, resolve, and use domains without exposing their real identity, thereby achieving stronger privacy protection and censorship resistance.
ultraLowGasFeesDesc: Based on Solana's high-performance network, the cost of registering, transferring, and managing domains is extremely low, with lightning-fast speeds, completing almost instantly.
searchAndCheckDesc: Enter the desired name in the search bar, and the system will check in real-time whether the domain is available and the current minimum registration price.
connectAndPurchaseDesc: Connect your Solana wallet and confirm the transaction. Your SOL will be used to pay the domain registration fee and minimal network fees.
auctionAndCalculationDesc: Survive the auction period, successfully win the domain and complete settlement (the highest bidder can set domain content and use it during the auction period).
setResolutionRecordsDesc: After settling the domain, you can set the domain price (if you don't want to sell, you can set an extremely high price) and resolution content (IPFS CID).
kiloBrowserDescription: A high-speed browser built specifically for Web3 domains. Deeply integrated with Solana nodes, supporting native domain resolution and hardware-level encryption protection, redefining your on-chain interaction experience.
downloadPlatformSupport: Full platform support, start your Web3 journey anytime, anywhere.
androidDesc: Google play or Github - no beta version
nativeWeb3DomainResolutionDesc: No need to install any plugins, directly access .kilo and other top-level domains in the address bar, supporting one-click access to decentralized content.
domainsThatPayYouDesc: Own valuable domains and earn rewards by inviting new users to register. Every purchase generates revenue for you.
futureInternetFirstEntry:
The First Gateway to the
Future Internet
kiloBrowserDescriptionHero: KILO is more than just a browser; it's a window to the Web3 world. Based on Brave, we natively integrate blockchain resolution capabilities into the browser's core, eliminating complex plugins and making decentralized domain experiences as smooth as traditional domains.
invitationDividendMechanismDesc: Invite friends to join Kilo. When they or the people they invite register and purchase exclusive domains, you will receive 52%/26%/13% of their payment amount as cash dividends in real-time (based on the invitation tier).
earlyDomainMintingDesc: Register high-value short domains, celebrity project names, or industry keywords. In the Kilo browser ecosystem, domains are the only identity sovereignty.
domainSpeculationAuctionDesc: Increase your domain's popularity through built-in market speculation. Once demand surges due to ecosystem development, you can sell at a premium in the secondary market.
domainSpeculationAuctionReward: Premium space entirely under your control
kiloDomainNotJustEntry: Kilo domains are not just an entry point, but your private asset. Build your Web3 empire by inviting friends, registering domains, buying low and selling high.
checkNetworkPortStatusDesc: Check and configure IPFS and RPC port settings in Web3 to ensure accessibility under current network conditions.
accessWeb3DomainsDesc: Directly enter top-level domains like .kilo in the address bar, e.g., dns.kilo, which is our built-in domain registration page.
troubleshootingDesc: If DNS can recognize the domain but cannot access content, please update IPFS, RPC gateway, or try refreshing the page.
downloadInstallSimpleSteps: After downloading and installing, just a few simple steps to start your Web3 browsing experience.
assetsNeedManualClaim: Assets need to be claimed manually after completion
withdrawalAmountMustBeGreaterThan: Withdrawal amount must be greater than {amount} SOL
withdrawalNote: Note: 1% service fee is used to maintain anonymous node pool and vault security. Minimum remaining balance in account is {{amount}} SOL.
blockConfirmedViewDetails: Block confirmed, you can view details in SOLANA Explorer
walletBalanceInsufficient: Your wallet balance is insufficient to pay for this transaction. Please top up and try again.
noActiveWalletConnection: No active wallet connection detected, please click the top right corner to connect wallet.
transactionRejectedInWallet: You have actively rejected this transaction in your wallet.
checkNetworkOrSwitchRPC: Please check your network connection or try switching RPC nodes.
enterIpnsId: Enter dynamic IPNS ID or Hash
protocolInfo: IPFS is suitable for static content, IPNS allows you to update content without changing the resolution address. Choose the protocol that suits your DApp or other content deployment needs.
makeMoneyInDecentralizedWeb: Make money in the decentralized web!
newAnonymousDomainEcosystemLaunching: A new anonymous domain ecosystem is launching
accessFullyAnonymousWebsites: Access fully anonymous websites with this decentralized browser
joinUsingMyInviteLink: Buy domains using my invite link
earlyUsersGetBiggestAdvantage: Early users get the biggest advantage!
accountNotActivatedDescription: Your account needs to be activated to start earning rewards, managing domains, and accessing all features.
connectWalletDescription: Connect your Solana wallet to get started
activateAccountDescription: Click the activate button to initialize your account
startEarningDescription: Begin earning rewards from domain registrations
activationNote: Account activation requires a small SOL deposit for on-chain storage
rentChangeInfo: Account structure changed, supplementary rent for resetting account space
recordCreationRentInfo: Used to create DNS record account, will be refunded if modified by other bidders
domainRecommendDeveloping: Domain recommendation feature is under development, stay tuned!
buildingDomainRecommendSystem: We are building a powerful domain recommendation system that will provide you with:
decentralizedAssetDiscovery: Decentralized Asset Discovery System © 2024 DECENTRALIZED ASSET DISCOVERY
